_description: Mac Mini (Apple Silicon) — MLX-LM backend. Merge the 'mlx-lm-mac-mini' block into your base models.json providers object, or use as a standalone models.json on the Mac Mini itself.
_notes: Server runs on port 8080 and 8081 (both serve the same models).
Multi-model server (LM Studio or equivalent) — all four models available simultaneously.
Mixed fleet (PC/Laptop on Ollama + Mac Mini on MLX): merge mlx-lm-mac-mini into your base models.json providers.
Single Mac Mini only: use this file directly as ~/.pi/agent/models.json.
Embeddings: keep Ollama running only for nomic-embed-text (1.5 GB).

models.name: Qwen3.6 35B-A3B MoE 8-bit (MLX)
models._notes: Primary workhorse — MoE with ~3.6B active params, 8-bit; fast throughput despite 35B total

models.name: Qwen3.6 27B 8-bit (MLX)
models._notes: Dense 27B — stronger reasoning and architecture review; slower than MoE
